relics.description.bloody_voodoo_doll.de: Stitched from coarse fabric and bound with darkened threads, this doll seems to carry someone’s pain within it, having absorbed it along with dried blood. It is made neither for protection nor for decoration — only to bind another’s flesh to its master’s will. Every wound dealt to the marked victim echoes deeper inside the doll, until the accumulated agony bursts outward in a hail of bloody needles. In the hands of one unafraid to work with such charms, the doll becomes an instrument of slow and inevitable retribution.
relics.description.bloody_voodoo_doll.ab: When the relic bearer deals damage to a target, they have a %1$s%% chance to apply Blood Mark to it for 3 seconds. Dealing damage again to a marked target refreshes the effect duration and stores the amount of damage dealt inside the mark. When Blood Mark expires, up to %3$s bloody needles are fired at the target one after another, each dealing %2$s damage per point of stored damage.
Each bloody needle hit restores %4$s health to the relic bearer.
On hit, a bloody needle has a %5$s%% chance to ricochet to the nearest target within %6$s blocks.
If a target dies from a bloody needle, with a %8$s%% chance releases up to %7$s additional needles in random directions around it.
+1 experience for each bloody needle released.
+1 experience for each successful bloody needle ricochet.
relics.description.cardiac_trap.descript: A strange device that combines crude mechanics with dark sorcery, as if created for one single purpose — to intercept the very moment of death. At its center pulses a crystal that beats to another creature’s heart rhythm, while thin needles and gears quietly wind with every beat. They say the trap does not save one from death — it merely halts the inevitable for a brief moment, forcing the heart to freeze between two beats. In that instant, the body is still alive, yet already standing on the threshold where every next movement may become the last.
When receiving fatal damage, prevents the relic bearer’s death and applies Heart Stop to them for %1$s seconds. During the effect, the bearer remains in a state close to death and must restore health to avoid dying when it ends. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
During Heart Stop, the relic bearer’s health regeneration is increased by %3$s%%.
When the ability triggers, all targets within %4$s blocks are paralyzed for %5$s seconds.
There is a %6$s%% chance that the ability does not go on cooldown after triggering.
+1 experience for each point of damage prevented when the ability triggers.
relics.description.cloak_of_the_bloody_f: A cloak embroidered with crimson feathers, each seemingly soaked in another’s pain. Light at a glance, it trembles ever so slightly with every blow, as if remembering the force and shape of the wound dealt. They say these feathers do not merely absorb suffering — they hone it, turning it into sharp, almost living needles. The moment battle calms for even an instant, the stored fury bursts outward, tearing through the air around the bearer in a chaotic bloody storm.

When the relic bearer takes damage, they have a %1$s%% chance to store %2$s bloody needles in a buffer. If the relic bearer takes no damage for 3 seconds, all stored needles are released one after another around them, dealing %3$s damage to each target hit.
Each hit from a released bloody needle adds 1 extra needle to the buffer.
Killing a target with a bloody needle restores %4$s health to the relic bearer.
Each bloody needle hit applies Bleeding level %5$s to the target for %6$s seconds.
+1 experience for each bloody needle hit.
+1 experience for each bloody needle released.
+1 experience for each extra needle gained through recycling.
+1 experience for each point of health restored by needle execution.
relics.description.flask_of_the_red_mist: A heavy glass flask filled with a dense crimson mist swirling inside, as if breathing with a life of its own. Its movement is slow and viscous, as though unwilling to leave the vessel, yet the moment the stopper loosens, it bursts outward and warps the space around it. They say this mist does not save one from death, but draws them away from it for a moment, allowing them to vanish from the blow and reappear where the enemy least expects.

When receiving fatal damage, prevents the relic bearer’s death and instantly teleports them behind the attacking target, applying the Bloody Step effect. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %1$s seconds.
The target that triggered the ability is blinded for %2$s seconds and loses sight of the relic bearer.
All creatures within %3$s blocks begin treating the ability’s target as their attack target.
The relic bearer’s next attack, performed no later than %4$s seconds after the ability triggers, deals %5$s%% more damage.
+1 experience for each point of damage prevented when the ability triggers.
+1 experience for each extra point of damage dealt by the empowered attack.
Bonus Damage Dealt by Empowered Attack
relics.description.living_flesh.descript: A shapeless lump of flesh bound by thin veins, slowly pulsing in time with another creature’s heart. It does not obey the ordinary laws of life: its surface contracts and stretches, as if listening to the movements around it. The moment its owner wounds a target, the flesh seems to remember it — and begins reaching after it, unwilling to let its prey go.
When dealing damage, the target is marked for %1$s seconds. If the marked target leaves a radius of 16 blocks from the relic bearer before the mark expires, it is affected by Devour, dealing %2$s damage.
Devour damage restores %3$s hunger points and %4$s saturation points to the relic bearer.
Devour damage restores %5$s health to the relic bearer.
If Devour does not kill the target, it can trigger again up to %7$s times with a %6$s%% chance on each trigger.
+1 experience for each point of hunger and saturation restored by Devour.
+1 experience for each point of health restored by Devour.
+1 experience for each additional Devour trigger.
relics.description.mask_of_hunger.descri: An old mask carved from darkened bone and bound with straps that seem to reach for the wearer’s face on their own. Its empty eye sockets are never truly empty — deep within them something stirs, searching for the warmth of other life. They say the mask does not satisfy hunger, but merely changes its form: instead of food, it demands the strength of other creatures. When the bearer’s body weakens, the mask awakens, sinking invisible veins into those nearby and draining life from them, as if trying to feed for two.
relics.description.mask_of_hunger.abilit: When the relic bearer’s health falls below %1$s%%, draining beams are applied to the %3$s nearest targets, dealing %2$s damage to each and restoring health to the relic bearer equal to the damage dealt. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %4$s seconds.
For each target struck by the ability, the relic bearer restores %5$s hunger points and %6$s saturation points.
Each target struck by a draining beam is paralyzed for %7$s seconds.
If at least one target dies from a draining beam, the ability’s cooldown is instantly reset.
+1 experience for each target struck when the ability triggers.
+1 experience for each target that restored hunger and saturation.
+1 experience for each cooldown reset trigger.
relics.description.ring_of_blades.descri: A slender ring adorned with tiny serrated edges that shift almost imperceptibly with every movement of the fingers. It was created by masters who believed that even a missed strike could be turned into a hit, if enough will were poured into it. The ring responds to failed swings, gathering the lost motion within itself and turning it into a flying blade.
relics.description.ring_of_blades.abilit: When a fully charged attack with the main-hand weapon misses, releases a bloody blade in the direction of the bearer’s gaze, dealing %1$s damage to the first target hit.
Each bloody blade hit restores %2$s health to the relic bearer.
The bloody blade deals %3$s%% more damage for each target it hits along its path.
With a %5$s%% chance, up to %4$s blades are released in an arc in front of the relic bearer instead of a single bloody blade.
+1 experience for each bloody blade released.
relics.description.sinner_crown.descript: A heavy crown cast from darkened metal and adorned with twisted spikes, as though forced into it by sheer power. Its inner side is always warm, as if preserving the imprint of those who wore it before. They say it once belonged to a ruler who did not execute his enemies, but made them serve even after death. Every fallen foe becomes part of that procession until the debt is paid.
When killing a target with a humanoid-sized hitbox, a dead one is summoned in its place for %1$s seconds, dealing %2$s damage per hit. No more than %3$s dead ones can exist at the same time.
Kills made by dead ones can also summon new dead ones.
Damage received by the relic bearer is distributed among all dead ones within %5$s blocks, preventing the bearer from taking it.
When a dead one dies or its duration expires, it explodes, dealing %4$s damage to all nearby targets.
+1 experience for each dead one summoned.
+1 experience for each creature killed by a dead one.
+1 experience for each dead one explosion.
+1 experience for each dead one created through lineage.
+1 experience for each point of damage distributed among dead ones.
Damage Dealt by Dead One Explosions
relics.description.slicer.description: A knuckle weapon stitched from living flesh and shards of bone that still twitch faintly beneath the skin. It was neither forged nor carved — it was grown, and it continues to change slowly, adapting itself to its owner’s hand. With every strike, the flesh tightens around it, absorbing force, while the bones within grind against each other as if craving more.
relics.description.slicer.ability.slicer: Allows the relic to be used as a weapon that deals %1$s damage and has %2$s attack speed. Each fully charged attack performed no later than %3$s seconds after the previous one grants 1 charge. Each charge increases damage dealt by %4$s%%. The maximum number of charges is %5$s. If the interval between attacks exceeds the allowed window, all charges are instantly lost.
After the combo window ends, charges are not lost instantly and instead decay by 1 per second.
+1 experience for each fully charged attack.

When used, creates an area with a radius of %1$s blocks. Inside the area, the relic bearer becomes invisible, invulnerable, suspended in the air, and loses control of movement. Every %3$s seconds, they teleport behind a random target within the area and strike it. Each target can only be hit once per ability activation. If all targets in the area have already been hit or no living creatures remain, the effect ends. After the effect ends, the ability goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
With a %5$s%% chance, a struck target is not considered attacked and can be selected again.
If at least one target is killed during the ability, the list of struck targets is cleared and the interval between attacks is reduced by %4$s seconds.
+1 experience for each attack performed during the ability.
+1 experience for each target killed during the ability.
relics.description.lunar_sextant.descrip: An ancient navigational instrument whose tarnished arcs still precisely track the movement of celestial bodies. Its scales are engraved not only for measurement, but for something greater — as if each mark corresponds to the alignment of forces hidden beyond the stars. In its wielder’s hands, the sextant ceases to be a tool of observation and begins to influence the sky itself, drawing cold shards of light down to the earth.
relics.description.lunar_sextant.ability: On a successful attack at night, has a %1$s%% chance to call down a falling star on the target, dealing %2$s damage.
The closer the moon is to its zenith, the higher the falling star’s damage. At its highest point, the multiplier reaches %3$s%%.
Being hit by a falling star stuns the target for %4$s seconds.
A falling star hit has a %5$s%% chance to call down another star on the nearest target within %6$s blocks. This effect can repeat.
relics.description.ender_bow.description: A bow assembled from a dark material that seems to almost swallow light, with faint violet fractures shimmering across its surface. Its string makes no sound, and the whole structure appears slightly displaced from space itself, as though it exists in two places at once. When the wielder draws it, the surrounding world seems to crack, revealing hidden silhouettes through barriers.
relics.description.ender_bow.ability.end: Releasing RMB at full draw fires an ender arrow in the direction the wielder is looking, dealing %1$s damage. While the string is drawn, targets are highlighted through walls in an area up to %2$s blocks long and %3$s blocks in radius around the line of sight.
Being hit by an ender arrow stuns the target for %4$s seconds.
Repeated hits with ender arrows apply a stacking effect to the target, increasing damage from such arrows by %5$s%% for %6$s seconds per stack.
Has a %7$s%% chance to additionally fire up to %8$s ender arrows in an arc in front of the wielder.
+1 experience for each fired ender arrow.
+1 experience for each ender arrow hit.
relics.description.ring_of_elusiveness.d: A tarnished ring with a shifting setting that slips from view the moment one tries to focus on it. In a dangerous moment, it seems to tear its wearer free from the familiar flow of space, leaving behind only a trembling trace.
relics.description.ring_of_elusiveness.a: Has up to %1$s charges that restore gradually. One charge is restored every %2$s seconds. Upon taking damage, if at least 1 charge is available, the damage is negated and the relic’s wearer is instantly teleported to a random nearby location within a radius of 16 blocks, consuming 1 charge.
Triggering the ability restores %3$s health to the relic’s wearer.
Triggering the ability applies an invisibility effect for %4$s seconds.
The next attack made within %5$s seconds after the ability triggers deals %6$s%% more damage.
+1 experience for each attack made within the window.
A device woven from thin streams of unstable matter, barely held in shape by a faint energy framework. It does not reflect magic directly — instead, it blurs the very structure of spells, turning them into useless scattered echoes before they can ever reach their target.
Has a %2$s%% chance to interrupt any spell cast within %1$s blocks of the relic’s wearer.
Each dispersed spell restores %3$s mana to the relic’s wearer.
The ability also disperses summoned creatures that touch the player.
Dispersing a spell increases damage dealt to its source by %4$s%% for %5$s seconds.
+1 experience for each dispersed summoned creature.
relics.description.dragon_blood_vial.des: A small vessel filled with a thick, dark-violet liquid in which a faint glow lazily swirls. The blood inside never clots and never loses its strength, as if the heart of an ancient dragon still beats within it. Let even a single drop spill, and the earth itself begins to breathe poisonous flame.
relics.description.dragon_blood_vial.abi: Upon taking damage, the relic’s wearer has a %1$s%% chance to throw a drop of dragon blood in a random direction. Upon landing, the drop creates a pool of dragon blood with a radius of %2$s blocks, dealing %3$s damage.
Remaining within the pool of dragon blood restores %4$s health per second to the relic’s wearer.
If the target that triggered the ability is still alive, the drop flies toward it.
When the drop lands, it has a %5$s%% chance to launch up to %6$s additional drops in different directions. Pools created by these drops have %7$s%% of the original drop’s stats.
+1 experience for each created dragon blood drop.
Damage dealt by blood drop pools
relics.description.dimension_key.descrip: A strange key whose blades do not match one another, as though it belongs to several locks in different parts of the world at once. Turn it in the air, and space itself responds, opening hidden passages between places where distance loses all meaning.
relics.description.dimension_key.ability: On first use, stores the current position. On second use, creates linked portals between the stored and current position for %1$s seconds, then clears the stored position. Pressing RMB while sneaking clears existing portals and their stored positions.
Within %5$s blocks of either portal, the relic wearer’s health regeneration is increased by %2$s%%.
Living entities that are not players receive tremor for %3$s seconds when passing through a portal.
When passing through a portal, the relic’s wearer gains invulnerability for %4$s seconds.
+1 experience for each created portal pair.
+1 experience for each traversal through a created portal.
relics.description.echo_glove.descriptio: A heavy glove whose depths resound dully with the echoes of others' blows, as though space itself remembers the force of every movement. Its surface vibrates slightly on impact, and each strike leaves behind a ghostly echo capable of leaping from the hand to seek a new target.
relics.description.echo_glove.ability.ec: When landing a hit, the relic’s wearer has a %1$s%% chance to duplicate %2$s%% of the original damage onto a random nearby target within %3$s blocks.
When Echo Strike triggers, the target is launched %4$s blocks upward, and the fall damage it takes is increased by %5$s%%.
When Echo Strike triggers, the target is stunned for %6$s seconds.
Each duplicated hit has the same chance to duplicate again onto another nearby target. The process is cyclical.
relics.description.galaxy_devourer_diade: A diadem that seems to contain a tiny cosmic core within it. Twisted streams of light slowly revolve in its depths, while the space around it is subtly drawn inward. It is said to mirror the nature of distant stellar catastrophes, where reality itself folds into itself.
On killing a target, the relic’s wearer has a %1$s%% chance to create a black hole that pulls in entities within %2$s blocks, deals %3$s damage to them, and lasts for %4$s seconds.
When the black hole collapses, all targets within %5$s blocks take %6$s%% of the total damage that black hole dealt during its lifetime.
Killing a target with the black hole extends its lifetime by %7$s seconds.
If a black hole consumes another black hole, it inherits %8$s%% of the consumed black hole’s attributes, and its lifetime is reset.
+1 experience for each created black hole.
+1 experience for each entity killed by a black hole.
relics.description.sealed_sword.descript: An ancient blade whose edge is covered in layers of seals, containing not one spirit but an entire swarm of obedient steel spirits. Such swords were once forged by battle mages who wished to fight in a dozen directions at once, trusting not only in sorcery to decide the outcome of battle. Once the seals weaken, the blades imprisoned within burst forth, circle their master, and hurl themselves at whomever he marks with his will.
Releases up to %1$s summoned swords, each with %2$s health and %3$s damage. Summoned swords follow their owner and automatically target the same entity he strikes. After the player attacks, all active swords lock onto the target and attack in sequence without interfering with one another. Each sword has knockback strength %5$s. If the target dies or is lost, the swords return to their owner and wait for the next attack to choose a new target. While a sword is active and not taking damage, it restores %7$s health every %6$s seconds. If a sword dies, it does not disappear permanently, but returns under the seal and is automatically resummoned after %4$s seconds.
The ability is deactivated and provides no bonuses.
Each successful hit from a summoned sword restores %8$s health to the owner, but not beyond their maximum health.
Each hit from a summoned sword has an %9$s%% chance to disorient the target, causing it to lose its current attack target and drop aggression.
Each active summoned sword within %10$s blocks of the owner increases the damage they deal by %11$s%%.
relics.description.sealed_rapier.descrip: A slender blade covered in elegant seals, containing swift and restless steel spirits. Such rapiers were crafted by masters who valued speed over brute force — their summoned blades wear enemies down with a flurry of rapid thrusts. Freed from their seals, the rapiers glide around their owner, reacting to every movement and darting toward whomever he chooses as a target.
relics.description.sealed_rapier.ability: Releases up to %1$s summoned rapiers, each with %2$s health and %3$s damage. Summoned rapiers follow their owner and target the same entity he strikes. After the player attacks, the rapiers lock onto the target and begin delivering rapid thrusts in sequence, maintaining constant pressure. Each rapier has knockback strength %5$s and a %6$s%% dodge chance, allowing it to completely ignore incoming damage. If the target is lost or dies, the rapiers return to their owner and wait for the next attack to choose a new target. While a rapier is active and not taking damage, it restores %8$s health every %7$s seconds. If a rapier dies, it does not disappear permanently, but returns under the seal and is automatically resummoned after %4$s seconds.
The ability is deactivated and provides no bonuses.
Each successful hit from a summoned rapier restores %9$s mana to the owner.
Each hit from a summoned rapier has a %10$s%% chance to inflict Bleeding on the target.
Each active summoned rapier near the owner increases the owner's attack speed by %11$s%%.
relics.description.sealed_claymore.descr: A heavy blade bound in massive seals that hold slow but unyielding steel spirits. Such claymores were created for those who prefer to endure a blow rather than avoid it. Every one of their movements carries crushing force. Freed from their seals, the claymores stay closer to their owner, shielding them and meeting enemies with heavy strikes. They know no haste, but they force opponents to focus on them, taking on the pressure of battle themselves.
relics.description.sealed_claymore.abili: Releases up to %1$s summoned claymores, each with %2$s health and %3$s damage. Summoned claymores follow their owner and attack the same target he chooses with his strikes. After the player attacks, the claymores lock onto the target and begin delivering infrequent but heavy blows, acting independently of one another. Each claymore has knockback strength %5$s. While a claymore is active and not taking damage, it restores %7$s health every %6$s seconds. If a claymore dies, it does not disappear permanently, but returns under the seal and is automatically resummoned after %4$s seconds. Additionally, claymores periodically taunt enemies: they activate a taunt area that forces at least %11$s nearby targets within %10$s blocks to switch to them for %8$s seconds. After triggering, the effect goes on cooldown for %9$s seconds.
The ability is deactivated and provides no bonuses.
Each successful hit from a summoned claymore grants the owner %12$s absorption, but the total absorption from this ability cannot exceed %13$s.
Each hit from a summoned claymore has a %14$s%% chance to stun the target for %15$s seconds.
Each active summoned claymore within %16$s blocks of the owner reduces incoming damage taken by %17$s%% per claymore.
relics.description.mirror_of_transgressi: An ancient mirror in a darkened frame, once owned by traveling mages who trusted neither roads, nor gates, nor even the boundaries of the world itself. Its surface does not reflect a face as it should: instead of features, distant rooms, familiar rooftops, and places to which the owner is most strongly bound appear within it.

When used, begins holding the reflection of the home point. If the relic’s wearer completes the use and takes no damage for %1$s seconds, the relic teleports them to their home point. Taking damage during use immediately interrupts the process and resets the accumulated use time.
If the relic’s wearer is looking toward their home point, use speed is increased by %2$s%%.
While the relic is being used, incoming damage to the wearer is reduced by %3$s%%.
Allows teleportation to the home point even across worlds.
+1 experience for each teleport to the home point.
relics.description.pulsar_mantle.descrip: A heavy mantle threaded with dimly glowing strands that converge at the chest and spread across the fabric like the rays of a dying star. In its folds pulses the rhythm of distant luminaries that fade and flare anew. Those who wore it noticed a strange pattern: the closer the body comes to death, the brighter the mantle responds, as though within it awakens a core of its own, unwilling to go dark alongside its owner.
relics.description.pulsar_mantle.ability: When the relic wearer’s health falls below %1$s%%, the mantle releases a stored pulse, sequentially firing %2$s magical projectiles in random directions, each dealing %3$s damage. After the burst ends, the ability goes on cooldown for %4$s seconds.
Each fired projectile creates a gravitational pulse that pushes entities within %5$s blocks away by up to %6$s blocks.
A projectile hit restores %7$s health to the relic’s wearer.
A projectile hit adds an additional magical projectile to the current burst.
relics.description.shadow_claws.descript: A pair of curved claws seemingly forged not from metal, but from condensed shadow. Their blades do not reflect light — instead, they draw it inward, leaving torn dark trails behind every movement. It is said these claws were created for mage hunters: they do not merely wound flesh, but tear power from the very essence of the victim.
Functions as a weapon dealing %1$s damage with %2$s attack speed. Each fully charged attack steals %3$s mana from the target.
If the target has mana, each missing 1%% of its mana increases damage dealt to it by %4$s%%.
+1 experience for each fully charged attack.
+1 experience for each successful mana steal.
Has up to %1$s charges, restoring 1 charge every %2$s seconds. Using the ability consumes 1 charge and releases three parallel shadow slashes in front of the relic’s wearer, each dealing %3$s damage.
Targets hit by the slash receive Bleeding level %4$s for %5$s seconds.
If the slash hits at least one target, the ability has a %6$s%% chance to restore 1 charge.
+1 experience for each use of the ability.
+1 experience for each target hit by the ability.
relics.description.hat_of_omniscience.de: A relic of pure thought. Its power has not yet awakened.
